results.title: Akwa Ibom gov sympathises with flood victims
results.description: By Patrick Odey Akwa Ibom State Governor Umo Eno has sympathised with families and individuals affected by the recent flash-flood experienced in some parts of the state, assuring them of his administration’s commitment to safeguarding lives and property. This is as he has directed remedial measures aimed at ameliorating the water flooding disaster in the [...] The post Akwa Ibom gov sympathises with flood victims appeared first on Healthwise .
